{
  "claims": [
    "The Fresno Regional Workforce Development Board has a proven track record in helping underemployed and unemployed people enter different industries.",
    "The ValleyBuild program focuses on construction.",
    "The ValleyBuild NOW program offers pre-apprenticeship training for women.",
